name: Thai President Foods Public Company Limited
summary: Thai President Foods Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture and distribution of instant noodles, semi-instant foods, and biscuits in Thailand. The company also offers fruit juices, wheat flour, and bread and bakery products; and manufactures and distributes paper packaging products, as well as provides packaging and printing services. In addition, it is involved in the real estate investment and lending business; and restaurant and drink business, as well as trading in rice brans. The company also exports its products to rest of Asia, Australia, Europe, Canada, and the Americas. Thai President Foods Public Company Limited was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
